ocr_findings.description: The tree-structure diagram (ツリー構造によるデータ管理) showing ルートディレクトリ, 音楽, 画像, どんぐりころころ.mp3, ぞうさん.mp3, おもちゃのチャチャチャ.mp3, バナナ.jpg, みかん.jpg, りんご.jpg is replaced by a single image reference '![img-0.jpeg](img-0.jpeg)'. All diagram node labels and file names within the figure are absent from OCR text.

Bottom table (ツリー構造に関する重要用語) is captured correctly with two rows; minor whitespace in cell content ('ルートディレクトリ
(Root Directory)') uses newline instead of space but meaning is preserved.

reviewer_notes: Learning content page covering ディレクトリとフォルダ and ツリー構造によるデータ管理. All body text is accurately captured. The diagram is rendered as an image placeholder, losing embedded label text (file/folder names inside the figure), which is a low-severity cosmetic loss since the surrounding prose explains the diagram. Table rows and column headers are correct.
